title: The Tea Party Opens
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Big Mom Pirates, Nami, Pedro, Luffy, Reiju, Jinbe as The wedding ceremony and tea party begin, with Big Mom’s enemies preparing to strike.
scene: The wedding begins under Big Mom’s watch, with hidden assassination plans moving beneath the ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The cake... the cake!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I was looking forward to it...

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Mama! Please, remain calm!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We under- stand how you must feel, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Head Chef! Please, run!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: MAMA'S acting quite dangerously!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Bring me another cake!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's impos- Bible!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Wedding or Life Cake!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's Soul POCUS*! She's going to suck out your lifespan! This is a scoop!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's calling out to the attachment that all humans have to life itself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you are even the slightest bit afraid of death ...look! There it is!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Eeek!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is crazy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Go, go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Big Mom's Going crazy out there!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're halfway to our wit's end here, too! Everyone in the hall's losing their minds!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Have all of 'em made it out?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I won't forget this, damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This is the last Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: Time for us to go, too, Pedro!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Okay! We'll back up Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Our turn, too!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We've gotta back up Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yeah! I've got the earplugs, too!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: We're gonna save Sanji's family!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We're leaving the rest to you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You human scum!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Is he really such a bad person?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He's the worst!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The second day of

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Those who steal my fun,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I shall steal their lives!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Monkey D. Luffy! I remember you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Which one! Which is the real straw hat?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Come, then! To the new world!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're the one that hasn't yet become the pirate King, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once again, I'm picking a fight with you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just because you're a yonkou doesn't mean you get to be cocky!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: I'll get Sanji back! Just you watch!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We'll be the ones

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That win in the end!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The cake's collapse- Ed!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Which one is straw hat Luffy?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmph... this guy's insane! Who'd ever think to go with a chaos- causing plan like this?!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: How dare he destroy my wedding cake!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I mean, no one'd even dare coming out head-on like this anyway!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Tea Party Begins storyline with 47 dialogue beats. The wedding and tea party begin, placing Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom, Bege and the Straw Hats on a collision course.
